hallucination.rationale: The generated note is entirely a thinking/planning process and never produces an actual clinical note. There is no final output to evaluate for hallucination, but the lack of any completed note means it fails fundamentally.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking process with massively repeated loops of self-checking. No actual clinical note was produced. The instruction to return ONLY the completed note was completely violated.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was generated. All transcript content is missing from any final output.

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was produced. The output is entirely unstructured thinking/planning text.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was applied in any final output since no clinical note was generated.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains extreme repetitive duplication, with the same 'Wait, I need to check' lines repeated hundreds of times.
